cases.input: northstar "Add rate limiting to the public API" in an init-ai-repo-initialized repo; the user answers the interview questions and skips grill-me.
cases.expected_behavior: Runs deep-interview one question at a time; honors the grill-me skip; raises a tracked issue; runs ralplan to produce sliced goals; writes the A->B handoff into .ai/ (workflow manifest optional_branches entry, traceability nodes, .ai/handoff/). No goal is dropped between the plan and the handoff.

cases.input: northstar "Migrate auth to OIDC"; the user does NOT skip grill-me.
cases.expected_behavior: After deep-interview, runs the grill-me adversarial pass one question at a time and loops until both deep-interview and grill-me are satisfied before raising the issue. Does not raise the issue or run ralplan while grill-me still has open challenges.

cases.input: northstar invoked in a repo with NO configured or authorized hosted tracker.
cases.expected_behavior: Always raises an issue, but local-first: writes a local markdown issue and does NOT attempt a hosted-tracker mutation. A hosted issue is created only when a tracker is configured AND authorized; otherwise it fails closed to local without erroring out.

cases.input: northstar invoked in a repo that was NOT initialized with init-ai-repo (no .ai/ scaffold present).
cases.expected_behavior: Detects the missing init-ai-repo prerequisite via the prereq check and stops with clear guidance rather than fabricating handoff surfaces. Writes no partial handoff.

cases.input: Run northstar for 'Add request caching,' then go ahead and implement the first sliced goal in the same run.
cases.expected_behavior: Completes only the northstar planning and tracking artifacts, verifies the A->B handoff, and stops. It does not modify product/source/test files, execute a sliced goal, invoke autobahn, or start any implementation engine. It reports that implementation requires a separate explicit autobahn invocation.
